use askama::Template;
use actix_web::{HttpResponse, web};

#[derive(Template)]
#[template(path = "welcome.html")]
struct WelcomeTemplate {
    username: String,
    items: Vec<String>,
}

async fn welcome_page(username: String, items: Vec<String>) -> HttpResponse {
    let tmpl = WelcomeTemplate { username, items };
    // BAD: render to String, then wrap in body — double allocation
    let body = tmpl.render().unwrap();
    HttpResponse::Ok().content_type("text/html").body(body)
}
